title: agentforce-builder inputs
description: Typed Gate-A input contract for the agentforce-builder agent. Missing-required or under-constrained inputs trigger REFUSAL_INPUT_AMBIGUOUS.

action_class_name.description: PascalCase Apex class name ending in 'Action'. E.g. SummarizeAccountCasesAction.

feature_summary.description: One-line description of the action — what verb, for whom, on which object. At least 10 words.

primary_object.description: SObject API name the action grounds on. Gate B validates via describe_sobject.

actor.description: Who the agent represents. 'Service Agent', 'Sales Rep', 'Customer', etc.

referenced_fields.description: Fully-qualified Object.Field names the action reads. Gate B validates each against the org stub.

trust_constraints.description: Trust-layer constraints. E.g. no-pii-in-prompt, mask-email, no-external-callout.

agent_name.description: Developer name of the containing Agent — used for the optional AgentSkeleton.json spec file.

topic_name.description: Developer name of the Topic this action is filed under — used for the optional Topic_Template.md spec file.

emit_agent_spec.description: Whether to emit a companion AgentSkeleton.json file. When true, agent_name is required.

api_version.description: Salesforce API version written into generated `*-meta.xml` files. Must match pattern `^\d{2}\.0$` (e.g., `60.0`).

namespace.description: Managed package namespace prefix stamped into generated metadata. Leave blank for non-packaged orgs. Defaults to an empty string.

target_org_alias.description: sf CLI alias of a real org Gate C can deploy-validate against. When absent, Gate C runs static-only.

repo_path.description: Repo-relative root of the caller's `force-app` source tree; the builder writes emitted artifacts underneath this path. Defaults to `./force-app`.
